title: Maren
text: Maren is an avid equine enthusiast who is deeply passionate about horses, hooves, and holistic care. Inspired by her two beloved geldings, she ventured into the world of hoof care after discovering the challenges they faced with their feet. This journey ignited a passion for equine podiatry and bodywork, leading her to found a boutique business specializing in hoof care, bodywork, and R+ training. In addition to her business, Maren serves as a Customer Experience Expert at Cavallo. With years of firsthand experience using Cavallo Boots on her horses, she guides customers in discovering the benefits of booted and barefoot hoof care. [ROLE] Customer Experience Expert

title: Cavallo ProFlex Splint Boots - Red
text: [SHORT DESCRIPTION] Cavallo ProFlex Splint, Turnout, Brushing Boots - Your BEST CHOICE in Leg Protection! Flexible and durable, with the incredible performance you can always expect from Cavallo! [PRODUCT TABS] Full description --- The Cavallo Guarantee --- Have a Finer-Boned Horse? Trek is the perfect boot! The Trek and ELB (Entry Level Boots) are the best choices for finer-boned horses. Both styles have a unique front-closure system that allows for an extra-snug fit on the upper portion of the boot – creating a very secure fit. title: Hoof Prints on the Journey - by Carole Herder
text: [SHORT DESCRIPTION] Rising feed costs, increasing vet and farrier bills, encroaching urban development, and overall stress are just some of the frustrations facing horse owners. Worries about your horse's soundness and well-being have humbled all horse owners. [PRODUCT TABS] Full description --- The Cavallo Guarantee --- Have a Finer-Boned Horse? Trek is the perfect boot! The Trek and ELB (Entry Level Boots) are the best choices for finer-boned horses. Both styles have a unique front-closure system that allows for an extra-snug fit on the upper portion of the boot – creating a very secure fit. On a finer-boned animal, the wrap-around Velcro closures can be drawn to the front and angled downward when the boot is being fastened, creating an almost “V” neck at the boot collar, tightening the fit: --- Keeping Horses is a Challenge Rising feed costs, increasing vet and farrier bills, encroaching urban development, and overall stress are just some of the frustrations facing horse owners. Worries about your horse's soundness and well-being have humbled all horse owners. Feeling powerless to cure lameness or disease can overwhelm us with denial, despair, and guilt. Living with horses is no longer a simple country life. The good news is, you are not alone. Your horse community and your horse health expert, inventor and author, Carole Herder are here to help.
